properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your love is everlasting, it's an everlasting love. Your mercy is as new as every rising of the sun.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And Your loving kindness, loving kindness is better than life!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Your Grace is all sufficient, it's an all sufficient Grace. Your Power and Your Glory are forever on display.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For Your loving kindness, loving kindness is better than life!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh… it's better. Oh, oh, oh… it's better than life. Oh, oh, oh, so much better. Oh, oh, oh, Jesus, your loving kindness, is better than life.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are there ten thousand of ten thousand you are there. Nothing in this world could ever measure or compare.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: To Your loving kindness, loving kindness is better than life!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: All Your ways are just, Oh Lord, You're just in all Your Ways. I will lift my hands, Oh Lord, in Gratitude and Praise.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh, oh, oh… it's better. Oh, oh, oh… it's better than life. Oh, oh, oh, so much better. Oh, oh, oh, Jesus, your loving kindness, Oh, oh, oh… it's better. Oh, oh, oh… it's better than life. Oh, oh, oh, so much better. Oh, oh, oh, Jesus, your loving kindness, Oh, oh, oh, Jesus, your loving kindness, Oh, oh, oh, Jesus, your loving kindness, is better than life!
